node.text: Quelle beauté santé de alicia je t'aime fort

Tu t'es blesser....mais faut pas avoir peur dans la postérité de jacob es ce que on se rappelle de son ainé...juste pour dire que Dieu vous a vraiment appeller et c'est pas pour subir la bas....je t'assure elle a quelque moi de plus que toi ! Paula. Mais toi et moi on se dure aussi moi je trouve que c'est équilibrer.🙌❤️
Quelle beauté santé de alicia je t'aime fort

node.text:
🚨 MICROSOFT JUST OPEN-SOURCED 60-MINUTE VOICE AI

Microsoft dropped VibeVoice — frontier voice AI that handles 60 minutes of audio in a single pass.

Ships with:
• Full ASR + speaker diarization + timestamps (no chunking)
• 90-minute multi-speaker TTS with natural turn-taking
• Real-time streaming TTS at 300ms latency
• 50+ languages & custom hotwords
• 0.5B realtime model that runs anywhere

Long-form voice AI is now 100% free and open source.

👉 https://github.com/microsoft/VibeVoice

Who’s building with VibeVoice today? Drop a 🔥
The voice stuff is some of the freakiest stuff to me :/

node.text: You are a breath of fresh air in today's standard of beauty where everyone follows same cookie cutting style,  make up techniques.  You kept it genuine, true to your natural beauty of youth and glow. Loved the scenes in Arafta where you had no to minimun makeup,  show casing natural beauty, no artificial nails done ( small details like that ) makes you stand out among millions. All the best for your success.
ما شاء الله جميله جداً اليسو

node.text:
Comment “Claude” to get the link.

Most people run out of tokens early because of how they use Claude, not how much they use it. 

Every message carries past context, so longer chats slowly become expensive.

A simple shift helps: give cleaner inputs. 

Remove extra words, avoid repeating context, and be specific. 

This reduces how much Claude has to process each time.

Also, Claude doesn’t need your full data every time. 

If you share only the important parts (like summaries or key points), it performs the same task with fewer tokens.

Model choice also matters. Using a heavier model for simple tasks increases token usage without adding real value.

Think of it like this: the clearer and shorter your input, the less work Claude has to do. And the longer your session lasts.

I have shared a lot more in the guide. Comment "Claude" and I'll share it with you.

#claude #ai #tokens #aitools #hacks

(Claude, Claude code, Claude skills, token limit, hacks, ai tools)

node.text:
Wireshark is a free, open source network protocol analyzer. It captures live traffic on your network and lets you inspect every packet in detail. It is one of the most widely used tools in network analysis, security investigations and troubleshooting.

The hardest part is not capturing traffic. It is knowing what to look for. That is where filters come in.

Here are 7 Wireshark filters worth knowing:

01. !(arp || icmp || ssdp || mdns || llmnr || nbns)
Removes all background broadcast noise. Your starting point before any investigation.

02. tcp.flags.syn==1 && tcp.flags.ack==0 && tcp.window_size<=1024
Port scan fingerprint. Rapid SYNs with tiny window sizes and no ACKs is almost always a scanner.

03. ip.addr==X.X.X.X && (tcp || udp) && !dns
Lock onto one host. See every connection it opens or receives without DNS cluttering the view.

04. http.request.method=="POST" && (frame contains "pass" || frame contains "user")
Credential hunt on plaintext HTTP. If a password is crossing the wire unencrypted, this finds it.

05. dns.flags.response==0 && dns.qry.name && frame.len>80
DNS anomaly detection. Legitimate queries are tiny. Anything over 80 bytes in a DNS query is worth a closer look.

06. tcp.flags==0x002 && !(ip.dst==192.168.0.0/16) && tcp.dstport!=80 && tcp.dstport!=443
Outbound connections on non-standard ports to external IPs. This is where reverse shells and C2 beacons show up.

07. tcp.len>1400 && !(ip.dst==192.168.0.0/16) && tcp.flags.push==1
Large payloads being pushed to an external destination. Classic data exfiltration pattern.

For this one I tried to combine these filters into a real investigation flow rather than listing them separately, so you can see how they build on each other in an actual analysis. Hope it makes Wireshark feel a bit less intimidating.

Save this for your next capture session.

#wireshark #networksecurity #blueteam #cybersecurity #infosec
Is it secured? I heard it is not
@curiobeo Secured what? Wireshark? If you are asking if using Wireshark is safe, it's %100 safe
How to run wireshark on checkpoint firewall interfaces. 😂

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by GABRIELLA ALONSO on March 30, 2026. May be an image of headscarf, umbrella, parasol, sundress and text.

node.text:
Being myself has never felt this good 🤍

Permítete disfrutarte tal y como eres 🤍
Permítete ser tú, sin bajar tu luz, sin hacerte más pequeña 🤍
Permítete ser tú, sin explicaciones, sin miedo 🤍
Belle demoiselle, laissez-moi vous dire à quel point vous êtes charmante. J'aimerais vous embrasser.🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹para la mujer bella
De donde es el set? Lo amoooo😍

node.text:
I just tested this Chinese AI agent from Alibaba. Called Accio Work, it basically seems to automate 90% of your ops, marketing, dev, and even procurement team! #AD 

Wanna try Accio Work for free? Download it now - link in bio!

@accio_b2b
#MyAccioWorks
That was literally my idea but i didn't have any proper guidance
only concern is that do u want to give ur crucial business data to a chinese company😂😂😂

node.text:
These are 5 beginner-friendly ML projects you can build in a weekend.

Building is the fastest way to actually learn and understand the concepts. Don’t get stuck in tutorial hell. Pick one project, fail, try again, improve and learn.

Comment “ML” and save this for when you’re ready to build.

#machinelearning #coding #AI #student #university

node.text: Hi 🫶 I should write something impactful regarding that divine gaze, Angelica, that the only pleasant thing is knowing that you are part of God 🙏That's why you have no competition in this world ♥️ there's nothing like you Except you 🙃 The blessing of having an angel taming a demon is that God exists and knows he cannot be stronger than him My fear of loving you, precious princess of flesh and blood, with the celestial name KRYSTALDIANNA ♥️🙏 If you have any doubts, ask God in my presence 🌹 I always bless your days, I always bless your nights, and I bless that I have you 🙃🫶🥰🫵💪 God, you and me 💍👑😌🙊🙉🙈 What a fool you've made me 😒☺️

node.text:
I built a trading agent and gave it $100 to trade for 5 days. Let's see if it makes money.

Crypto, stocks, gold, oil — it picks. Hard-coded guardrails so it can't blow up. Already placing trades.

🔗 Live dashboard (every trade, real-time PnL):

 https://dashboard-seven-alpha-56.vercel.app/ 

Posting a daily update for the next 5 days

. Comment ‘Trade’ and I will send you the Github repository to setup your own autonomous trading agent.

#ai #anthropic #claudeai  #claude 

[Claude Ai Agent Claude Leak Gemma Google One Trading Anthropic Sam Altaman Claude Code]

node.text:
Stop scrolling if you’re still training AI by making it read books about physics.

Imagine teaching someone to swim just by letting them read books about water.

That’s exactly how we’ve trained AI on physics — text only — until now.

Polymathic AI dropped **The Well**: 15TB of real physics simulations across 16 datasets (supernovas, fluid flows, biological systems). Models experience the actual data instead of guessing.

👉 https://github.com/PolymathicAI/the_well/

#TheWell #PhysicsAI #ScientificAI #OpenSourceAI #AIResearch
It’s not a model. It’s a dataset.
Does this Work with gemma4 on openclaw?

Data is just a different language, but it’s still a language, not the real world. It’s a step better than learning hydro dynamics from papers about it but…
“Real physics simulations” 😂
Dataset not a model and 15tb of simulation data isn't the same as 15b parameter model, fck are u talk about? Stop doing the hard drugs g
Does this Work with gemma4 on openclaw?
It’s not a model. It’s a dataset.

node.text:
🔴Be Your Own Therapist is here. Check the link in the bio.
Most people don’t understand the difference between influence, persuasion, and manipulation… and that’s exactly why they get controlled.

Influence is harmless, someone suggests something, and you still choose.
Persuasion targets your logic and emotions, but you’re aware of it.
But manipulation is different. It distorts your reality so subtly that you don’t even realise you’re being controlled.

A real manipulator never looks like a manipulator.
They make your decisions feel like your own.

They don’t stop you directly,
they create friction, guilt, doubt, and emotional pressure until you start choosing what they want.

Like:
• Someone creating constant conflict so you withdraw
• A coworker planting doubt before you even present
• Someone oversharing to make you feel obligated to open up

This is covert manipulation psychology, subtle, invisible, and extremely common.

The dangerous part?
You don’t feel controlled. You feel like you “decided.”

If you don’t understand these patterns, you won’t just miss manipulators…
you’ll cooperate with them.

Learn to read intentions, not just words.
Because control doesn’t look like control anymore, it looks like choice.
Bro you manipulated me to follow you 😂
Ye to dhoti khol rha hey😂
Last walii tou merii BAAT hi hogaii😒
Do u have any suggestions in books to study manipulation correctly!?
Everyone is confused in the coment section😂😂
Bro you manipulated me to follow you 😂

node.text:
Stop leaving OpenClaw exposed! 🛡️ Most people setting up OpenClaw are building a playground for hackers. 

SWIPE 👉 for the 4 crucial steps to bulletproof your AI setup.

In my latest video, I show you exactly how to turn your setup into an invisible fortress.

From total Tailscale invisibility to Venice AI privacy and Matrix encryption, we’re hardening every layer. We even dive into how to audit your system automatically and why you must scan community skills before you install them.

🔗 Comment "Security" and we'll send you a link to watch the full video.

Or 

🔗 OR Link in Bio!

node.text: Yahn bt angoothe ki ho rhe hai?🙂

I remember when their wedding video went viral, where her husband gently asked her and placed his hand on her shoulder. At that time, so many girls were commenting things like ‘what a husband,’ ‘dream husband,’ and ‘every girl wants a man like him.’ But now, just look at the reality. That’s why it’s said—don’t be impressed by what you see on the surface. Never wish for someone’s life just by watching a moment, because appearances can be deceiving.
How disgusting are couples who forget their good times and in bad times they are spreading shits from their mouths for each other....
Yahn bt angoothe ki ho rhe hai?🙂

node.text:
السلام علیکم 
میرا پیغام ان لوگوں کے لیے یہ ہے جو طرح طرح کے عمل سے اپنا پیسہ اور وقت لٹا چکے ہیں 
اصل اور  نقل کی پہچان کرنا اور اس کے بارے میں جاننا ہے یہ اپ کا اخلاقی حق ہے 
ہر کام اپنی انکھوں کے سامنے ہوتا ہوا دیکھیں 
اللہ پاک کے کلام میں ہر مسئلے کا لکھا ہوا ہے 
شادی کا مسئلہ ہو یا طلاق کا مسئلہ ہو رشتوں کی بندی ہو یا کاروبار کا مسئلہ ہو 
ہر کام 100 فیصد رازداری اور گارنٹی کے ساتھ کیا جاتا ہے 
ابھی کال کریں اور ابھی مدد حاصل کریں 
0092_0345_674_3376

🚨 REVERSE ENGINEER ANY REPO INTO ITS ORIGINAL PROMPT

Paste any GitHub link into GitReverse.com → instantly get the exact prompt that built it.
No guessing. No lost context. Pure AI magic.
Forgot how you made that fire project? Solved in seconds.

👉 GitReverse.com

Who’s doing their best today? Drop a 🔥
#GitReverse #PromptEngineering #GitHubAI #ReverseEngineer #AIPrompts
It is funny to see how bad people prompt, but nothing else
Oke Claude remake Linux from scratch in Rust, make no mistakes
Ppl don't want to fork bcuz it gives the repo clout, they want to steal 😂😂😂😂😂
It is funny to see how bad people prompt, but nothing else

node.text: Angelina has had a bout with Bells/Palsy in the past and this is what it looks too me like she’s recovering from another episode??? Otherwise she looks gorgeous all the time😍
İnşaallah zombiye dönüşmüyorlardır. Bunun filminş yapmışlardu bir zamanlar
The question is, what have you done??

node.text:
tasty veins 😩
These X-Men films focus on a younger generation of mutants discovering their powers in a world that fears and misunderstands them. The story blends superhero action, emotional conflict, and sci-fi drama, showing how mutants struggle to control their abilities while deciding who they want to become.
Sophie Turner plays Jean Grey, a powerful mutant whose telepathic and telekinetic abilities are far stronger than she realizes. Her character arc centers on identity, control, and inner darkness, as she battles emotions and forces that threaten both herself and the people she loves.
Evan Peters plays Quicksilver, a fast-moving mutant known for his super speed, humor, and standout action scenes. He brings levity and energy to the films, often stealing scenes with creative, slow-motion sequences that contrast with the heavier themes around him.
#evanpeters #memes #foryou #fyp #sophieturner

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by Saufiyah Ali on March 30, 2026. May be a doodle of poster, magazine and text that says 'SHAWWAL 11SHAWWAL1407SAUFYAHALI 1447 SAUFIYAH ALI THE ISLAMIC THEISLAMICLIFEDESIGN LIFE DESIGN the most powerful islamic paradoxes of life 15 Complex Truths From the Qur'an & Sunnah That Will Change How You See The World AeOCKmи 家迎速地设 To 0 (EVERYONE YONE NEEDS To READ THIS) (EVER'.

Photo by Saufiyah Ali on March 30, 2026. May be an illustration of poster and text that says '11SHAWWAL1447SAUFYAHALI 11 SHAWWAL 1447 SAUFIYAH ALI THEISLAMICLIFEDESIGN THE ISLAMIC LIFE DESIGN the dunya paradox The more you chase it, the more it it runs from you. 3:185 Allah calls the life of this world mata' al-ghurur, the enjoyment of delusion. The less you cling to this world, the more it opens up. The less you worship it, the less power it has over you. Use worldly things without letting them own you. 1/15'.

Photo by Saufiyah Ali on March 30, 2026. May be a black-and-white image of ‎poster and ‎text that says '‎SHAWWAL 1447 SAUFIYAHALI ALI THE SLAMIC LIFE DESIGN the strength paradox The heaviest weight is not always visible. Anger looks powerful. Restraining anger is even more powerful. Muslim 2609 The Prophet ﷺُ said the strong person is not one who wrestles well rather the strong person is one who can control himself while in a state of anger. Someone who can master the self and master their nafs.‎'‎‎.

Photo by Saufiyah Ali on March 30, 2026. May be a graphic of ‎money, poster, magazine and ‎text that says '‎1SHAWWAL147|SAUFYAHALI SHAWWAL 1447 SAUFIYAH ALI THE ISLAMIC LIFE DESIGN the Wealth paradox Spending decreases nothing. What leaves your hand is not gone. Allah returns it as reward, barakah, protection, or opened provision. The miser thinks he is preserving his wealth by not giving it away. No! He is only preserving his fear of poverty. R 2:268 Satan threatens you with poverty and orders you to immorality, while Allãh promises you forgiveness from Him and bounty. قة صدقة 3/15‎'‎‎.

Photo by Saufiyah Ali on March 30, 2026. May be an image of poster and text that says '11 SHAWWAL 11SHAWWAL1447SAUFYAHALI 1447 SAUFIYAH ALI TH ISLAMIC LIFE DESIGN the hardship paradox Ease is hidden inside the thing you are trying to escape. 94:5 Allah says: For indeed, with hardship is . 94:6 Indeed, with hardship is ease. Twice. The opening and the trial can exist at the same time even when all you can see is the pain. 4/15'.

Photo by Saufiyah Ali on March 30, 2026. May be an illustration of poster, book and text that says '11 SHAWWAL 1SHAWWAL147ISAUFYAHALI 1447 SAUFIYAH ALI THEISLAMICLIFEDESIGN THE SLAMIC LIFE DESIGN the knowledge paradox The more you learn, the smaller you youfeel. feel. 2:268 It it is only those who have knowledge among His slaves that fear Allãh. Real knowledge does not make you bigger. It makes Allah greater in your eyes and you smaller before Him. If knowledge breeds pride, it has missed its point. 5/15'.

Photo by Saufiyah Ali on March 30, 2026. May be an image of magazine, poster and text that says '11SHAWWAL17SAUFYAHALI 11 SHAWWAL 1447 SAUFIYAH ALI THE ISLAMIC THEISLAMICLIFEDESIGN LIFE DESIGN the tawakkul paradox The more you rely upon Allah, the more α way opens. You take the means, then leave the outcome to Allah knowing the result was never going to come from your effort. 65:2 And whoever is mindful of Allah, He will make for them a way... Doors that looked closed will open from places you never expected. 6/15'.

Photo by Saufiyah Ali on March 30, 2026. May be an image of poster, magazine and text that says '11 SHAWWAL 1447 SAUFIYAH ALI THE ISLAMIC LIFE DESIGN the gratitude paradox Thanking Allah before the increase is what unlocks the increase. Allah's promise is direct: 14:7 Ifyou are grateful, will surely increase you. Most people wait to see more before they become grateful. The believer doesn't wait. Right now you're breathing without thinking about it. Your heart is pumping 2,000 gallons of blood day. Your eyes are processing 576 megapixels of visual data. Your immune system is fighting threats you never even felt. Allah didn't have to do that. Gratitude is a door that increase walks through. 7/15'.

Photo by Saufiyah Ali on March 30, 2026. May be an image of poster and text that says '11SHAWWAL1447|SAUFYAHALI SHAWWAL 1447 SAUFIYAH ALI THE SLAMIC LIFE DESIGN the for rgiveness paradox Forgiving others fo forgives you. 24:22 Let them pardon and overlook. Do you not love that Allah should forgive you? A grudge feels like power but usually it is a a prison. Forgiveness does not erase what happened but it stops it from living inside you. 8/15'.

Photo by Saufiyah Ali on March 30, 2026. May be an image of poster, newspaper and text that says '11 SHAWWAL 11SHAWWAL1447|SAUFYAHALI 1447 SAUFIYAH ALI THEISLAMICLIFEDESIGN THE ISLAMIC LIFE DESIGN the time paradox Give time to Allah and your time expands. You think Qur'an and prayer takes from your day. No. They put barakah in everything. One hour does the work of seven. One pot of food feeds gathering One paycheck covers more than it should. One workout gives energy all day. One du'a changes what efforts could never. What you give to Allah returns with weight. 9/15'.

Photo by Saufiyah Ali on March 30, 2026. May be a doodle of magazine, newspaper, poster and text that says 'SHAWWAL 1447 SAUFIYAHALI ALI THE ISLAMIC LIFE DESIGN the community paradox Standing together protects what standing alone cannot. 3:103 Hold firmly to the rope of Allah all together and do not become divided. node.text:
Most people think Islam is just rules.

It is not.

It is a way of seeing life correctly.

The strange thing is that so many of Allah’s deepest truths look backwards at first.

You go lower and Allah raises you.
You give and you keep more.
You remember death and you start living better.
You let go and a way opens.

These paradoxes expose how limited our default way of thinking is.

Islām is not limited to the visible world. It also deals with the unseen (jinn) world, the metaphysical laws beneath ordinary life.

And once you see that, you start noticing it everywhere.

Here are the 15 paradoxes that will change how you see the world…

.
.
.

Islam explains the modern life better than the modern world does.

Comment news and I’ll send you the letters that go deeper.

We have over 88,000 people in the community now.

Alhamdulillah.

.
.
.

Slide 6 reference: Only those fear Allāh, from among His servants, who have knowledge 35:28*

Yergin explores how the shale revolution, the energy transition to renewables, and the "Map of Cold War I" are reshaping global alliances. He explains how the quest for energy security drives the foreign policies of the U.S., Russia, and China. By re-centering the narrative on the ancient trade routes of Central Asia, he reveals how the "center of the world" is returning to its original roots. This book is essential for understanding the historical depth behind China's S modern "Belt and Road Initiative." the SILK ROADS boa Walfem Delnwgle ANEWHISTORY A NEW HISTORY THE WORLD PETER FRANKOPAN'.

node.text:
If you want to understand why borders are where they are, why trade wars start, and where the next global conflict might erupt, you need to think like a geostrategist. Geography isn’t just about maps; it’s about power, resources, and the survival of nations.
We have rounded up 7 Must-Read Books that will completely shift your perspective on global affairs. From the physical “prisons” of our terrain to the “chessboards” of Eurasia, these titles are the ultimate toolkit for building a sharp geopolitical mind. 📚⚖️
Inside this list:
✅ Prisoners of Geography – Why mountains and rivers dictate destiny.
✅ The New Map – How energy and climate are rewriting the rules.
✅ Destined for War – The high-stakes rivalry between the US and China.

Geopolitics | International Relations | World History Books | Political Science | Strategic Thinking | Foreign Policy | Global Affairs | Map Analysis | Geostrategy | Book Recommendations | Non-Fiction Reads | World Order | Economic History | Diplomacy | National Security | Power Dynamics | Tim Marshall | Henry Kissinger | Peter Zeihan | Global Strategy | Understanding the World | Educational Content | History Buff | Political Geography | Global Trends

#geopolítics #breakingnews #x #books #geography
I really don't think China and the United States are destined for war anytime soon

Take this list with a grain of salt. All of my geography professors detest Kaplan and Marshall’s books. They are the continuation of 19th century-early 20th century ‘environmental determinism’. This theory posited that climate, terrain etc. were the main dictator of human culture. These revivals are simple narratives, which offer no critique of imperialism, colonialism etc. While geographical features can influence, to say that ‘political theorising’ is less important is just so stupid. In a globalised world, vulnerability is held in the social network, not so much in the ground.

@annsztaziap derek Gregory’s works, particularly on Afghanistan! Anything written by Gerard Ó Tuathail, Simon Dalby, John Agnew or Fiona McConell or Sarah Koopman! They all write on critical geopolitics, which unsettles the state’s ’playing game of Risk’ style geopolitical analysis, which Marshall and Kaplan love. They show the uneven (not always state-centred) global power structure, and bring it down to the everyday, to the intimate and informal moments where geopolitics is enacted (particularly feminist perspectives like Koopman or Fiona McConnell)

node.text:
🚨 Screen Studio charges $29 a month for this. Someone just open-sourced the entire thing for FREE.
Meet OpenScreen — 8,400+ GitHub stars and exploding.
You hit record. It automatically turns your screen into a polished, professional demo video.
Auto-zoom on clicks.�Smooth cursor animations + motion blur.�Custom backgrounds, webcam overlays, annotations, timeline edits.�Export any aspect ratio. No watermarks. No accounts. No subscriptions.
Exact same workflow as Screen Studio and Loom… but 100% free.
Even crazier: a dev forked it into Recordly — full native recording on Mac + Windows, frame-for-frame zoom perfection, advanced cursor pipeline, audio tracks, and reactive webcam scaling.
Both MIT licensed. Both work on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
Download. Record. Export. Done.
👉 Full repo (and fork):�https://github.com/siddharthvaddem/openscreen
Who else is deleting their paid screen recorder today? Drop a 🔥 if you’re trying this right now.
#OpenScreen #ScreenStudioAlternative #OpenSourceTools #FreeScreenRecorder #ProductivityHacks
I would rather pay 49$ for a well build product.

node.text:
🚨 BREAKING: Someone just built a self-hosted AI app that processes all your receipts and invoices automatically.

You upload a photo. It extracts the product, taxes, dates, and auto-converts the currency, and keeps your financial data 100% private.

100% Open Source.

Link: github.com/vas3k/TaxHacker
So that person has all my data
Now we need the version that does small business accounting and tax preparation according to state laws and helps you capture all your business expenses and supports multi small businesses
I am fucking building dailyexpensetracker.in for more than a year now 😭

This is a game-changer! Tools like Expensify and Receipt Bank have been doing similar things, but a self-hosted option could really enhance data security. Curious how they handle data privacy—any insights on that? 🤔
" 60% of the time all the time" 😂
So that person has all my data

node.text:
یہ ویڈیو ایک حیران کن حقیقت کو ظاہر کرتی ہے جہاں AI کے ذریعے بننے والی تصاویر انسانوں کو خوفزدہ کر رہی ہیں۔ کچھ پرامٹس ایسے ہیں جو سسٹم کی پالیسی کو بائی پاس کر کے عجیب اور ڈسٹربنگ نتائج دیتے ہیں۔ کیا واقعی AI اتنا خطرناک ہو سکتا ہے؟ اپنی رائے ضرور دیں اور جانیں اس ٹرینڈ کے پیچھے کی حقیقت۔

Yeh video aik hairan kun haqeeqat ko zahir karti hai jahan AI ke zariye banne wali images insanon ko khaufzada kar rahi hain. Kuch prompts aise hain jo system ki policy ko bypass kar ke ajeeb aur disturbing results dete hain. Kya waqai AI itna khatarnak ho sakta hai? Apni raye zaroor dein aur janein is trend ke peeche ki haqeeqat.

#AI #ChatGPT #GeminiAI #TechPakistan #AIMystery
Not even close to Epstein files 😂
Gora center meh jao Maza ayga😍 mentally stable hu jauge😍
create a n image of random scene taken with an iphone 6 with the flash on,chaotic, and uncanny
There is a way to jailbreak and trick AI so that it will give you the information that it should not give

node.text:
He conquered the city but didn’t let it conquer his character!

ps, the poem is not a direct quote, it is a simplified synthesis of themes from the Divan Of Avni (Mehmed II’s poetry), adapted for short form.

@mehmincanan granted, vlad and Mehmet never even fought a pitched battle because vlad's army was wayyy snaller. Vlad died in the end but he inflicted way more losses to the ottomans becuz of his scorched earth tactic.

node.text:
Claude Code is powerful… but let’s be honest — it’s quite expensive.

So here’s a simple way to run Claude Code 100% free (no API key, no subscription) using local models 👇

I’ll keep this under 30 seconds:
→ Install Ollama
→ Get a free AI model
→ Run Claude Code locally

Step 1 — Install Ollama as an app or Run this in your terminal:
curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh

Step 2 — Install an AI model

If you’re using terminal:
ollama pull <model-name>

Or open the app and install something like:
qwen-coder, deepseek, gemma, etc.

Step 3 — Install Claude Code with this terminal command: “curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash”

Step 4 — Launch it with this terminal command: “ollama launch claude”

Pick your model → authenticate once in browser → done.

That’s it.

You now have Claude Code running locally — for free.

No API keys.
No subscriptions.

Just local LLMs doing the work.

This is honestly a game changer!

node.text:
True beauty is not only products and routines.

It is also what you ask from Allah.

Because when Allah grants beauty, it is different.

It carries barakah. It feels effortless. It lasts.

Take care of yourself, but don’t forget to ask the One who created beauty itself.
check your dms in sha allah
check your dms in sha allah

Iran ne Oracle aur Amazon ke data centers target kiye 💣 2020 mein Corona ne WebRTC engineers banaye. 2026 mein yeh crisis kaunsi jobs create karega? 5 roles jo abhi EXPLODE hone wale hain 🔥 Save krlo - baad mein dhundhega toh nahi milega.
#tech #datacenter #cloudcomputing #aws #iran

node.text:
🚨 BREAKING: Someone just dropped the most advanced Steganography Platform EVER!! 😱🥚

STE.GG is an open-source toolkit that hides secrets inside ANYTHING! images, audio, text, PDFs, network packets, ZIP archives, and even emojis 😘️︎︎️️️️︎︎︎️︎︎️️︎︎︎️︎︎️️️️︎️︎️︎️️︎︎️︎︎︎️︎️︎︎️︎︎︎︎︎︎️︎️︎︎︎︎︎️︎︎️️︎︎︎️︎︎️︎︎️︎️︎︎️️️︎︎️︎️️︎︎️︎︎️️️️️︎​
AND it has an AI agent built in 👀

🔍 REVEAL: drop any file and the AI agent tests every known decoding method automatically. 120 LSB combinations, DCT, PVD, chroma, palette, PNG chunks, trailing data, metadata, Unicode, and more. 50 tools running in parallel.

auto-extracts hidden payloads as downloadable artifacts. no config needed.

🔮 CONCEAL: type your secret, pick a method (or let the AI choose), upload a carrier image OR generate one with AI. 

one click → encoded steg file. the agent recommends the optimal method based on your use case.
My resume is going through every employer who's using ai lmao

Steganography has so many fascinating applications beyond security! For instance, researchers used it in digital watermarking for protecting art online. Tools like OpenStego or Steghide can help you dive into the tech. Have you considered the ethical implications of this kind of platform?
this is old news, and google to others check this stuff for viruses and stuff.
Can you thus hide more information in one file for the same memory usage ?
OCR... Unicode and Ansi etc still working Im aways removing stuff like this from my pc haha
Are there any resources like this that will decode?
Steganography has been around for forever
😂😂😂 eso siempre se ha podido hacer jajajaja 😛 internet Explorer

node.text:
Do you think marriage is the problem… or the person?

.
#explore #marriageadvice
#relationshipadvice
#modernrelationships
#relationshiptruth
[toxicrelationships
relationshipcoach
marriagegoals
loveandlogic
emotionalintelligence
pakistanireels
reelitfeelit
relationshipfacts]
I prefer to know each other before getting married 😔😔 to see whether her mindset match with your mindset!! 😊
App nai Jo Baat ki hai , mai already is tarah ki kosish Ker Kai nakam ho chuka hon ..,. Tali dono hath sath bachti hai sirf aik banday Ki kosish say Nahi.
Don't you think that social media has ruined the family system. Mostly women are effected.

I wanted to ask you a question? I was in a  serious relationship four_five years ago But that time she left me at my worst And I fought every fight in life alone But now she came back should i accept her or not
I prefer to know each other before getting married 😔😔 to see whether her mindset match with your mindset!! 😊

node.text:
Learning reverse engineering is easier than you think! (Pt. 1)

Start off by actually learning things you’re passionate about and remove unnecessary pressure from the learning process!!

•
•
•
•
•
#swizsecurity #hacking #cyber #security #reverseengineering
Hack shit that's how I learned Reverse engineering
Best way to learn reversing is to do a game cheat, it's a lot of fun and a lot of people are willing to help
@utcn_ac_community agreed! I’m just not really into games as much anymore growing up stinks lol
How to reverse engineering and apk? Too much trackers in android app
@crabby.5 probably won’t do too much (if any) android reversing I have some stuff on my blog you should go check it out, ripping apart APKs is actually pretty easy just use JADX-GUI

Photo by Danique Sipkes + Brandon McGill on March 31, 2026. May be a meme of poster and text that says 'THE INSIGHT 01 SHOWING UP AS YOURSELF IS NOT NEUTRAL. IT IS A LIABILITY. Your identity is not fixed. It collection of fears, experiences, and labels you absorbed from other people before you had the judgment to refuse them. Every time you walk into high-stakes moment carrying that accumulated identity, you bring the limitations with it: the self-doubt, the memory of failure, the need for approval, the fear of judgment. The alter ego is not lie. Itis a deliberate decision about which version of yourself is allowed to perform.'.

node.text:
This is looking at life as a high performance sport while on the hero’s journey.

Sometimes in order to accomplish great feats you have to access something outside of “self”.

Or if you want to enter a different world and change your reality by collapsing the timeline, activating your alter ego is a great way to do that.

It’s why musicians use different names, authors use pseudonyms, how actors get into character etc. 

———

MYXfamily is a living user manual we’re writing for our kids; a record of how we think, decide, and build.

Our carousels capture moments and ideas, not complete systems or finished conclusions.

Shared as documentation, not direction.

I read this book years ago, and it also changed my life about how I see myself in the world. I’ve used it in to embody different traits that I went to situate in myself and have created characters that perform such a task so it definitely does provide a psychological distance between who I was raised to be, and who I choose to be.
@myxfamily this post just sparked the mental shift I've been asking for. Thanks for sharing 👌🏾
So "fake it till you make it" basically. 😂
Trust me y'all don't need no alter egos, that's where identity crisis kicks in, just master yourself, emotions and ask Jesus Christ for help in doing so, truste it works everytime

I read this book years ago, and it also changed my life about how I see myself in the world. I’ve used it in to embody different traits that I went to situate in myself and have created characters that perform such a task so it definitely does provide a psychological distance between who I was raised to be, and who I choose to be.

node.text:
🔥 THIS GUY BUILT A VIDEO SEARCH ENGINE THAT RUNS 100% ON YOUR MACHINE

No API.�No cloud.�No transcription.�Fully local.

You just type what you’re looking for — “person walking a dog near a lake” — and it instantly finds the exact timestamp, pulls the clip, and trims it for you.

The AI literally watches your videos frame-by-frame using Qwen3-VL embeddings running locally. It understands what’s happening, not just keywords.
Perfect for Tesla dashcams, security footage, home videos, or your entire video library.
Zero data ever leaves your computer. 

Pure privacy.
Open-source. Insanely useful. Runs on your Mac/PC.
👉 Full repo + install in 2 minutes:�https://github.com/ssrajadh/sentrysearch

Who else is done with cloud video tools spying on everything? Drop a 🔥 if you’re indexing your footage TODAY.

#SentrySearch #LocalAI #VideoSearch #DashcamAI #PrivacyFirst

node.text:
Darkweb marketplaces 👾

Follow @zeroday.security 

Dark web marketplaces operate as underground economies built on anonymity, cryptocurrency, and trust systems.

Most are short-lived, often disappearing due to law enforcement actions, scams, or internal failures
.
.
.
#darknet #darknetmarketplaces #cia #cybertools #cybersecurityawareness
